Project.name: video-slide-md
Project.annotation: Automatically extract slide intervals from educational videos, link to SRT/VTT subtitles, enhance with LLM vision analysis, and export presentations.
Project.keywords: video, slides, markdown, presentation, open-cv, computer-vision, slide-detection, subtitle-alignment, srt, vtt, marp, llm, lm-studio, vision

Actors.actor-User: Content creator with a lecture video and optional SRT/VTT subtitles

UC-001.Action: Runs video-slide-md detect with video + subtitles (all-in-one)
UC-001.Goal: Get slides.json with slide intervals, representative images, aligned transcript, and optional exports
UC-001.AcceptanceCriteria: slides.json passes validation, all slides have images, transcript aligned, optional deck.md/deck.pptx generated

UC-002.Goal: Get deck.md — a Marp-formatted Markdown presentation
UC-002.AcceptanceCriteria: deck.md renders correctly in Marp-compatible viewer

UC-003.Goal: Get debug artifacts: diff_scores.csv, timeline.png, contact_sheet.jpg
UC-003.AcceptanceCriteria: Artifacts exist and contain correct data, timeline shows slide changes

UC-004.Action: Runs video-slide-md llm-process with slides.json + slides images
UC-004.Goal: Get enriched slides.json with LLM-generated slide descriptions and corrected transcript
UC-004.Preconditions: slides.json exists with slide images, LM Studio running with vision-capable model
UC-004.AcceptanceCriteria: Each slide has llm_description field with accurate content summary, transcript corrected with slide context terms

UC-005.Action: Runs video-slide-md detect-slides with video only (no subtitles)
UC-005.Goal: Get slides.json with slide intervals and representative screenshots — no transcript
UC-005.AcceptanceCriteria: slides.json with slide intervals and images present. No transcript fields. No errors about missing subtitles.

UC-006.Action: Runs video-slide-md notes with slides.json + subtitles
UC-006.Goal: Get enhanced slides.json with context-aware notes — combines visual slide analysis with subtitle text
UC-006.Preconditions: slides.json exists with slide images, subtitles or transcript available
UC-006.AcceptanceCriteria: Notes on each slide reflect both what was said AND what is on the slide. Notes are clean, not raw SRT fragments. Can run multiple times with different subtitles/notes-modes without re-detecting slides.

UC-007.Action: Runs video-slide-md roi-tool with a video file
UC-007.Goal: Get ignore-roi coordinates (x1,y1,x2,y2) by visually selecting a region on the video frame
UC-007.AcceptanceCriteria: Opens a window showing a frame from the video. User drags a rectangle. Coordinates printed to stdout. Pipes directly into --ignore-roi flag.

NonGoals.item-1: No automatic speech recognition (ASR) — subtitles already prepared
NonGoals.item-2: No OCR text extraction No cloud/remote processing — local only No web UI with user management No automatic video download from YouTube/Zoom/Meet

Constraints.constraint-1: Must process video without loading entire file into memory (streaming)
Constraints.constraint-2: Must support Windows, Linux, macOS paths cross-platform
Constraints.constraint-3: Must support Cyrillic in paths and subtitle text
Constraints.constraint-4: Must not hard-depend on CUDA — CPU fallback required
Constraints.constraint-5: Slide detection is deterministic CV — no LLM for change detection
Constraints.constraint-6: Core processing must not be coupled to UI
Constraints.constraint-7: LLM processing is optional — pipeline works without it
Constraints.constraint-8: LLM client must support OpenAI-compatible API (LM Studio)
Constraints.constraint-9: Model must be unloaded after processing to free VRAM
Constraints.constraint-10: Stage-based pipeline: detect-slides and notes must be independent commands, not one monolithic step
Constraints.constraint-11: ROI tool must use only built-in OpenCV (no PyQt/Tkinter/Gradio)
Constraints.constraint-12: Adding subtitles or changing notes-mode must not require re-running slide detection

Risks.risk-1: Low-quality or highly compressed video may cause false positives in slide detection
Risks.risk-2: Cyrillic subtitle encoding issues on some platforms
Risks.risk-3: GPU backend may not be available on all systems
Risks.risk-4: Animations and transitions between slides may cause split or missed segments
Risks.risk-5: Webcam overlay and UI elements may cause false slide splits
Risks.risk-6: LM Studio may not be running or model may be unavailable
Risks.risk-7: Vision LLM may hallucinate slide content details
Risks.risk-8: Context window may be exceeded for long slide transcripts

OpenQuestions.question-1: Should representative timestamp be configurable or fixed at 80% into segment?
OpenQuestions.question-2: Should multiple ignore_rois be specified as repeated --ignore-roi flags or comma-separated?
